text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: skreuzer
Date: Fri Jan 15 21:43:50 UTC 2021
New revision: 561676
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/561676

Log:
  Add port for py-tasklib

  tasklib is a Python library for interacting with taskwarrior databases, using a
  queryset API similar to that of Django?s ORM.

  PR:		252677
  Submitted by:	Thierry Dussuet <thierry.dussuet@protonmail.com>

  head/devel/py-tasklib/
  head/devel/py-tasklib/Makefile
  head/devel/py-tasklib/distinfo
  head/devel/py-tasklib/pkg-descr
